headline: ADP Q3 Earnings Top Estimates on Strong Revenue Execution
summary: Automatic Data Processing tops on Q3 earnings, with 7% revenue growth and rising client funds income, while boosting its FY26 outlook on strong execution.

headline: Can AI really boost productivity and sustain economic growth?
summary: Thornburg Investment Management head of fixed income Christian Hoffmann and 42 Macro founder Darius Dale share their perspectives on what the rapid adoption of AI means for productivity, the Federal Reserve's neutral interest rate, and the US labor market.

headline: Nominations Open for Platts Global Energy Awards 2026
summary: S&P Global Energy, the leading independent provider of information, data, analysis, benchmark prices and workflow solutions for the commodities, energy expansion and energy transition markets, today announced the call for nominations for the Platts Global Energy Awards program, now in its 28th year. Nominations will close on July 1, 2026, and finalists will be announced on the Awards website on September 1, 2026.

headline: S&P Global Expands India Hub As Gurugram Office Opens And Valuation Debated
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) has opened a major new office in Downtown Gurugram, India. The facility is designed to accommodate more than 3,500 employees with a focus on technology, sustainability and employee wellbeing. The expansion reinforces India as a key talent and operations hub within S&P Global's global footprint. S&P Global, trading at $433.47, is adding fresh capacity in India at a time when its longer term returns remain mixed, with a 24.8% return over 3 years and 13.8% over 5 years,...
